subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured in the signs of God, beseech Him that thou mayest become a servant at His Threshold of Oneness and in the Court of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله از خدا بخواه که در درگاه احدیتش خادم گردی و در ساحت حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love as fire, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
